notes: Distinguish between essence and appearance. God knows our heart, and He cannot be deceived. We

quotes.text: Faithful members of the Church who are true to their covenants with the Master do not need every jot and tittle spelled out for them. Christlike conduct flows from the deepest wellsprings of the human heart and soul. It is guided by the Holy Spirit of the Lord, which is promised in gospel ordinances. Our greatest hope should be to enjoy the sanctification which comes from this divine guidance; our greatest fear should be to forfeit these blessings. May we so live that we may be able to say, as did the Psalmist, “Search me, O God, and know my heart.
quotes.speaker: James E. Faust
quotes.attr: James E. Faust, in Conference Report, Apr. 1998, 23; or Ensign, May 1998, 20

notes: This psalm was probably penned by David when persecuted by Saul; and perhaps partly relates to Doeg the Edomite, as Psalm 52and 120.
